_comment: Non-secret settings only. All credentials go in .env (see .env.example).

lidarr._root_folder_comment: Leave blank to auto-detect from Lidarr

_match_threshold_comment: Fuzzy match strictness 0-100. 80 is a safe default.

playlists._comment: Playlist ID is the part after /playlist/ in the Spotify share URL
playlists._sync_mode_comment: add_only = never remove tracks | full_sync = mirror Spotify, remove stale | rebuild = wipe and recreate from scratch every run (preserves Spotify track order, cleans drift)
